_comment: Copy this file to baseline/YYYY-MM-DD.json on day 15 of the pilot, fill in the values from /admin/metrics?days=14, and commit. PRD owner signs off in PR. Replace ALL `null` / `TBD` values; do not invent numbers. Sections that read placeholder in the dashboard (LINE adoption if the OA wasn't published yet) should stay null with a note in `notes`.

formErrorRate._source: /admin/metrics → 'อัตราข้อผิดพลาดในการกรอก' card

timeToCompleteSec._source: /admin/metrics → 'เวลาเฉลี่ยจนเสร็จ' card

supportTickets._source: /admin/metrics → 'ตั๋ว support ที่บันทึก' card

exportFailureRate._source: /admin/metrics → 'อัตรา export ล้มเหลว' card

lineLoginAdoption._source: /admin/metrics → 'การใช้ LINE Login' card

lineNotifyOptIn._source: /admin/metrics → 'ผู้รับแจ้งเตือน LINE' card

mobileCompletionRate._source: /admin/metrics → 'อัตราทำงานบนมือถือสำเร็จ' card

publishesDaily._source: /admin/metrics → 'Publish ต่อวัน' card (sum across window)

notes: Free-form caveats. Examples: 'Day 4 had a 2-hour outage from the auth provider', 'Email permission for LINE was approved on day 6 so adoption only had 8 days to grow', 'Mobile completion rate dragged down by old iPad fleet that doesn't run modern Safari'.
